# Clean Responsive Web Page

A minimal static web application featuring a clean, responsive design with header, card list, and call-to-action button.

## Features

- **Responsive Header**: Sticky header with navigation links
- **Hero Section**: Eye-catching introduction with gradient background
- **Card Grid**: Responsive card layout displaying key features
- **CTA Section**: Prominent call-to-action button
- **Smooth Animations**: Cards animate into view when scrolled
- **Mobile-Friendly**: Fully responsive design for all screen sizes

## File Structure

- `index.html` - Main HTML structure
- `styles.css` - Responsive CSS styling
- `app.js` - Interactive JavaScript functionality

## Usage

Open `index.html` in a web browser to view the application.

## Design Details

- Clean, modern aesthetic
- Purple gradient color scheme
- Smooth hover effects
- Card-based layout
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Intersection Observer animations
